title: basananthe nummularia
intro: Basananthe nummularia is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, commonly known as the coin-leaf or coin-leaved staff vine. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Basananthe nummularia include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
